title: Part 6: Chapter 1 - General
description: This article is about Chapter 32 general information including definitions, participation requirements, eligibility for those on active duty and those not on active duty, election of benefits between chapter 32 and 34, election of benefits between chapter 32 and 106, determining entitlement, charging entitlement, delimiting date, delimiting date extensions, computing benefit payments, requirements and comparability. also another chapter that covers section 903 with general information, eligibility for individuals on and off active duty as well as dependents, determining entitlement, charging entitlement, delimiting date and delimiting date extensions, computing benefit payments and requirements and comparability.
